SKUNTANK.pokedex: It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.

BRONZOR.name: Bronzor
BRONZOR.pokedex: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.

BRONZONG.name: Bronzong
BRONZONG.pokedex: One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep.

BONSLY.name: Bonsly
BONSLY.pokedex: It looks as if it is always crying. It is actually adjusting its body's fluid levels by eliminating excess.

MIMEJR.name: Mime Jr.
MIMEJR.pokedex: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.

HAPPINY.name: Happiny
HAPPINY.pokedex: It loves round white things. It carries an egg-shaped rock in imitation of Chansey.

CHATOT.name: Chatot
CHATOT.pokedex: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

SPIRITOMB.name: Spiritomb
SPIRITOMB.pokedex: A Pokémon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone.

GIBLE.name: Gible
GIBLE.pokedex: It nests in small, horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to catch prey that stray too close.

GABITE.name: Gabite
GABITE.pokedex: There is a long-held belief that medicine made from its scales will heal even incurable illnesses.

GARCHOMP.name: Garchomp
GARCHOMP.pokedex: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.

MUNCHLAX.name: Munchlax
MUNCHLAX.pokedex: It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing.

RIOLU.name: Riolu
RIOLU.pokedex: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.

LUCARIO.name: Lucario
LUCARIO.pokedex: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.

HIPPOPOTAS.name: Hippopotas
HIPPOPOTAS.pokedex: It lives in arid places. Instead of perspiration, it expels grainy sand from its body.

HIPPOWDON.name: Hippowdon
HIPPOWDON.pokedex: It blasts internally stored sand from ports on its body to create a towering twister for attack.

SKORUPI.name: Skorupi
SKORUPI.pokedex: It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.

DRAPION.name: Drapion
DRAPION.pokedex: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.

CROAGUNK.name: Croagunk
CROAGUNK.pokedex: Its cheeks hold poison sacs. It tries to catch foes off guard to jab them with toxic fingers.

TOXICROAK.name: Toxicroak
TOXICROAK.pokedex: Its knuckle claws secrete a toxin so vile that even a scratch could prove fatal.

CARNIVINE.name: Carnivine
CARNIVINE.pokedex: It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

FINNEON.name: Finneon
FINNEON.pokedex: After long exposure to sunlight, the patterns on its tail fins shine vividly when darkness arrives.

LUMINEON.name: Lumineon
LUMINEON.pokedex: It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins.

MANTYKE.name: Mantyke
MANTYKE.pokedex: A friendly Pokémon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae.

SNOVER.name: Snover
SNOVER.pokedex: It lives on snowy mountains. Having had little contact with humans, it is boldly inquisitive.

ABOMASNOW.name: Abomasnow
ABOMASNOW.pokedex: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.

WEAVILE.name: Weavile
WEAVILE.pokedex: They live in cold regions, forming groups of four or five that hunt prey with impressive coordination.

MAGNEZONE.name: Magnezone
MAGNEZONE.pokedex: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

LICKILICKY.name: Lickilicky
LICKILICKY.pokedex: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool.

RHYPERIOR.name: Rhyperior
RHYPERIOR.pokedex: It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them. Geodude are shot at rare times.

TANGROWTH.name: Tangrowth
TANGROWTH.pokedex: It ensnares prey by extending arms made of vines. Losing arms to predators does not trouble it.

ELECTIVIRE.name: Electivire
ELECTIVIRE.pokedex: It pushes the tips of its two tails against the foe, then lets loose with over 20,000 volts of power.

MAGMORTAR.name: Magmortar
MAGMORTAR.pokedex: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters.

TOGEKISS.name: Togekiss
TOGEKISS.pokedex: It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.

YANMEGA.name: Yanmega
YANMEGA.pokedex: By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes.

LEAFEON.name: Leafeon
LEAFEON.pokedex: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.

GLACEON.name: Glaceon
GLACEON.pokedex: As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.

GLISCOR.name: Gliscor
GLISCOR.pokedex: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!

MAMOSWINE.name: Mamoswine
MAMOSWINE.pokedex: Its impressive tusks are made of ice. The population thinned when it turned warm after the ice age.

PORYGONZ.name: Porygon-Z
PORYGONZ.pokedex: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.

GALLADE.name: Gallade
GALLADE.pokedex: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.

PROBOPASS.name: Probopass
PROBOPASS.pokedex: It exudes strong magnetism from all over. It controls three small units called Mini-Noses.

DUSKNOIR.name: Dusknoir
DUSKNOIR.pokedex: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there.

FROSLASS.name: Froslass
FROSLASS.pokedex: It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.

ROTOM.name: Rotom
ROTOM.pokedex: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

UXIE.name: Uxie
UXIE.pokedex: Known as "The Being of Knowledge." It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.

MESPRIT.name: Mesprit
MESPRIT.pokedex: Known as "The Being of Emotion." It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

AZELF.name: Azelf
AZELF.pokedex: Known as "The Being of Willpower." It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.

DIALGA.name: Dialga
DIALGA.pokedex: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.

PALKIA.name: Palkia
PALKIA.pokedex: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

HEATRAN.name: Heatran
HEATRAN.pokedex: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

REGIGIGAS.name: Regigigas
REGIGIGAS.pokedex: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.

GIRATINA.name: Giratina
GIRATINA.pokedex: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.

CRESSELIA.name: Cresselia
CRESSELIA.pokedex: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

PHIONE.name: Phione
PHIONE.pokedex: A Pokémon that lives in warm seas. It inflates the flotation sac on its head to drift and search for food.

MANAPHY.name: Manaphy
MANAPHY.pokedex: Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace.

DARKRAI.name: Darkrai
DARKRAI.pokedex: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

SHAYMIN.name: Shaymin
SHAYMIN.pokedex: It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.

ARCEUS.name: Arceus
ARCEUS.pokedex: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.

VICTINI.name: Victini
VICTINI.pokedex: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

SNIVY.name: Snivy
SNIVY.pokedex: They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.

SERVINE.name: Servine
SERVINE.pokedex: They avoid attacks by sinking into the shadows of thick foliage. They retaliate with masterful whipping techniques.

SERPERIOR.name: Serperior
SERPERIOR.pokedex: They raise their heads to intimidate opponents, but only give it their all when fighting a powerful opponent.

TEPIG.name: Tepig
TEPIG.pokedex: It blows fire through its nose. When it catches a cold, the fire becomes pitch-black smoke instead.

PIGNITE.name: Pignite
PIGNITE.pokedex: Whatever it eats becomes fuel for the flame in its stomach. When it is angered, the intensity of the flame increases.

EMBOAR.name: Emboar
EMBOAR.pokedex: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

OSHAWOTT.name: Oshawott
OSHAWOTT.pokedex: The scalchop on its stomach is made from the same elements as claws. It detaches the scalchop for use as a blade.

DEWOTT.name: Dewott
DEWOTT.pokedex: Scalchop techniques differ from one Dewott to another. It never neglects maintaining its scalchops.

SAMUROTT.name: Samurott
SAMUROTT.pokedex: Part of the armor on its anterior legs becomes a giant sword. Its cry alone is enough to intimidate most enemies.

PATRAT.name: Patrat
PATRAT.pokedex: Extremely cautious, they take shifts to maintain a constant watch of their nest. They feel insecure without a lookout.

WATCHOG.name: Watchog
WATCHOG.pokedex: They make the patterns on their bodies shine in order to threaten predators. Keen eyesight lets them see in the dark.

LILLIPUP.name: Lillipup
LILLIPUP.pokedex: The long hair around its face provides an amazing radar that lets it sense subtle changes in its surroundings.

HERDIER.name: Herdier
HERDIER.pokedex: It loyally follows its Trainer's orders. For ages, they have helped Trainers raise Pokémon.

STOUTLAND.name: Stoutland
STOUTLAND.pokedex: This extremely wise Pokémon excels at rescuing people stranded at sea or in the mountains.

PURRLOIN.name: Purrloin
PURRLOIN.pokedex: Its cute act is a ruse. When victims let down their guard, they find their items taken. It attacks with sharp claws.

LIEPARD.name: Liepard
LIEPARD.pokedex: Stealthily, it sneaks up on its target, striking from behind before its victim has a chance to react.

PANSAGE.name: Pansage
PANSAGE.pokedex: It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokémon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.

SIMISAGE.name: Simisage
SIMISAGE.pokedex: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

PANSEAR.name: Pansear
PANSEAR.pokedex: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600º F.

SIMISEAR.name: Simisear
SIMISEAR.pokedex: A flame burns inside its body. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents.

PANPOUR.name: Panpour
PANPOUR.pokedex: It does not thrive in dry environments. It keeps itself damp by shooting water stored in its head tuft from its tail.

SIMIPOUR.name: Simipour
SIMIPOUR.pokedex: The high-pressure water expelled from its tail is so powerful, it can destroy a concrete wall.

MUNNA.name: Munna
MUNNA.pokedex: It eats the dreams of people and Pokémon. When it eats a pleasant dreams, it expels pink-colored mist.

MUSHARNA.name: Musharna
MUSHARNA.pokedex: With the mist from its forehead, it can create shapes of things from dreams it has eaten.

PIDOVE.name: Pidove
PIDOVE.pokedex: These Pokémon live in cities. They are accustomed to people. Flocks often gather in parks and plazas.

TRANQUILL.name: Tranquill
TRANQUILL.pokedex: Many people believe that, deep in the forest where Tranquill live, there is a peaceful place where there is no war.

UNFEZANT.name: Unfezant
UNFEZANT.pokedex: Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves feel close to anyone other than their Trainers.

BLITZLE.name: Blitzle
BLITZLE.pokedex: When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.

ZEBSTRIKA.name: Zebstrika
ZEBSTRIKA.pokedex: This ill-tempered Pokémon is dangerous because when it's angry, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.

ROGGENROLA.name: Roggenrola
ROGGENROLA.pokedex: They were discovered a hundred years ago in an earthquake fissure. Inside each one is an energy core.

BOLDORE.name: Boldore
BOLDORE.pokedex: Because its energy was too great to be contained, the energy leaked and formed orange crystals.

GIGALITH.name: Gigalith
GIGALITH.pokedex: The solar energy absorbed by its body's orange crystals is magnified internally and fired from its mouth.

WOOBAT.name: Woobat
WOOBAT.pokedex: Suction from its nostrils enables it to stick to cave walls during sleep. It leaves a heart-shaped mark behind.

SWOOBAT.name: Swoobat
SWOOBAT.pokedex: Anyone who comes into contact with the ultrasonic waves emitted by a courting male experiences a positive mood shift.

DRILBUR.name: Drilbur
DRILBUR.pokedex: It makes its way swiftly through the soil by putting both claws together and rotating at high speed.

EXCADRILL.name: Excadrill
EXCADRILL.pokedex: More than 300 feet below the surface, they build mazelike nests. Their activity can be destructive to subway tunnels.

AUDINO.name: Audino
AUDINO.pokedex: Its auditory sense is astounding. It has a radar-like ability to understand its surrounding through slight sounds.

TIMBURR.name: Timburr
TIMBURR.pokedex: These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.

GURDURR.name: Gurdurr
GURDURR.pokedex: They strengthen their bodies by carrying steel beams. They show off their big muscles to their friends.

CONKELDURR.name: Conkeldurr
CONKELDURR.pokedex: They use concrete pillars as walking canes. They know moves that enable them to swing the pillars freely in battle.

TYMPOLE.name: Tympole
TYMPOLE.pokedex: By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans. It uses the rhythm of these sounds to talk.

PALPITOAD.name: Palpitoad
PALPITOAD.pokedex: It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to capture prey.

SEISMITOAD.name: Seismitoad
SEISMITOAD.pokedex: It increases the power of its punches by vibrating the bumps on its fists. It can turn a boulder to rubble with one punch.

THROH.name: Throh
THROH.pokedex: When they encounter foes bigger than themselves, they try to throw them. They always travel in packs of five.

SAWK.name: Sawk
SAWK.pokedex: Tying their belts gets them pumped and makes their punches more destructive. Disturbing their training angers them.

SEWADDLE.name: Sewaddle
SEWADDLE.pokedex: This Pokémon makes clothes for itself. It chews up leaves and sews them with sticky thread extruded from its mouth.

SWADLOON.name: Swadloon
SWADLOON.pokedex: It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests.

LEAVANNY.name: Leavanny
LEAVANNY.pokedex: It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.

VENIPEDE.name: Venipede
VENIPEDE.pokedex: It discovers what is going on around it by using the feelers on its head and tail. It is brutally aggresive.

WHIRLIPEDE.name: Whirlipede
WHIRLIPEDE.pokedex: It is usually motionless, but when attacked, it rotates at high speed and then crashes into its opponent.

SCOLIPEDE.name: Scolipede
SCOLIPEDE.pokedex: Highly aggressive, it uses the claws near its neck to dig into its opponents and poison them.

COTTONEE.name: Cottonee
COTTONEE.pokedex: They go wherever the wind takes them. On rainy days, their bodies are heavier, so they take shelter beneath big trees.

WHIMSICOTT.name: Whimsicott
WHIMSICOTT.pokedex: Riding whirlwinds, they appear. These Pokémon sneak through gaps into houses and cause all sorts of mischief.

PETILIL.name: Petilil
PETILIL.pokedex: Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.

LILLIGANT.name: Lilligant
LILLIGANT.pokedex: The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect. It withers if a Trainer does not take good care of it.

BASCULIN.name: Basculin
BASCULIN.pokedex: Savage, violent Pokémon, red and blue Basculin are always fighting each other over territory.

SANDILE.name: Sandile
SANDILE.pokedex: It moves along below the sand's surface, except for its nose and eyes. A dark membrane shields its eyes from the sun.

KROKOROK.name: Krokorok
KROKOROK.pokedex: The special membrane covering its eyes can sense the heat of objects, so it can see its surroundings, even in darkness.

KROOKODILE.name: Krookodile
KROOKODILE.pokedex: It can expand the focus of its eyes, enabling it to see objects in the far distance as if it were using binoculars.

DARUMAKA.name: Darumaka
DARUMAKA.pokedex: Darumaka's droppings are hot, so people used to put them in their clothes to keep themselves warm.

DARMANITAN.name: Darmanitan
DARMANITAN.pokedex: When weakened in battle, it transforms into a stone statue. Then it sharpens its mind and fights on mentally.

MARACTUS.name: Maractus
MARACTUS.pokedex: Arid regions are their habitat. They move rhythmically, making a sound similar to maracas.

DWEBBLE.name: Dwebble
DWEBBLE.pokedex: It makes a hole in a suitable rock. If that rock breaks, the Pokémon remains agitated until it locates a replacement.

CRUSTLE.name: Crustle
CRUSTLE.pokedex: It possesses legs of enormous strength, enabling it to carry heavy slabs for many days, even when crossing arid land.

SCRAGGY.name: Scraggy
SCRAGGY.pokedex: It immediately headbutts anyone that makes eye contact with it. Its skull is massively thick.

SCRAFTY.name: Scrafty
SCRAFTY.pokedex: It can smash concrete blocks with its kicking attacks. The one with the biggest crest is the group leader.

SIGILYPH.name: Sigilyph
SIGILYPH.pokedex: The guardians of an ancient city, they use their psychic power to attack enemies that invade their territory.

YAMASK.name: Yamask
YAMASK.pokedex: These Pokémon arose from the spirits of people interred in graves in past ages. Each retains memories of its former life.

COFAGRIGUS.name: Cofagrigus
COFAGRIGUS.pokedex: They pretend to be elaborate coffins to teach lessons to grave robbers. Their bodies are covered in pure gold.

TIRTOUGA.name: Tirtouga
TIRTOUGA.pokedex: About 100 million years ago, these Pokémon swam in oceans. It is thought they also went on land to attack prey.

CARRACOSTA.name: Carracosta
CARRACOSTA.pokedex: Incredible jaw strength enables them to chew up steel beams and rocks along with their prey.

ARCHEN.name: Archen
ARCHEN.pokedex: Revived from a fossil, this Pokémon is thought to be the ancestor of all bird Pokémon.

ARCHEOPS.name: Archeops
ARCHEOPS.pokedex: It runs better than it flies. It catches prey by running at speeds comparable to those of an automobile.

TRUBBISH.name: Trubbish
TRUBBISH.pokedex: The combination of garbage bags and industrial waste caused the chemical reaction that crated this Pokémon.

GARBODOR.name: Garbodor
GARBODOR.pokedex: They absorb garbage and make it part of their bodies. They shoot a poisonous liquid from their right-hand fingertips.

ZORUA.name: Zorua
ZORUA.pokedex: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

ZOROARK.name: Zoroark
ZOROARK.pokedex: Each has the ability to fool a large group of people simultaneously. They protect their lair with illusory scenery.

MINCCINO.name: Minccino
MINCCINO.pokedex: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.

CINCCINO.name: Cinccino
CINCCINO.pokedex: Their white fur feels amazing to touch. Their fur repels dust and prevents static electricity from building up.

GOTHITA.name: Gothita
GOTHITA.pokedex: They intently observe both Trainers and Pokémon. Apparently, they are looking at something that only Gothita can see.

GOTHORITA.name: Gothorita
GOTHORITA.pokedex: Starlight is the source of their power. At night, they mark star positions by using psychic power to float stones.

GOTHITELLE.name: Gothitelle
GOTHITELLE.pokedex: They can predict the future from the placement and movement of the stars. They can see Trainers' life spans.

SOLOSIS.name: Solosis
SOLOSIS.pokedex: Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they can survive in any environment.

DUOSION.name: Duosion
DUOSION.pokedex: When their brains, now divided in two, are thinking the same thoughts, these Pokémon exhibit their maximum power.

REUNICLUS.name: Reuniclus
REUNICLUS.pokedex: These remarkably intelligent Pokémon fight by controlling arms that can grip with rock-crushing power.

DUCKLETT.name: Ducklett
DUCKLETT.pokedex: When attacked, it uses its feathers to splash water, escaping under cover of the spray.

SWANNA.name: Swanna
SWANNA.pokedex: It administers sharp, powerful pecks with its bill. It whips its long neck to deliver forceful repeated strikes.

VANILLITE.name: Vanillite
VANILLITE.pokedex: This Pokémon formed from icicles bathed in energy from the morning sun. It sleeps buried in snow.

VANILLISH.name: Vanillish
VANILLISH.pokedex: It conceals itself from enemy eyes by creating many small ice particles and hiding among them.

VANILLUXE.name: Vanilluxe
VANILLUXE.pokedex: If both heads get angry simultaneously, this Pokémon expels a blizzard, burying everything in snow.

DEERLING.name: Deerling
DEERLING.pokedex: The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon's fur. People use it to mark the seasons.

SAWSBUCK.name: Sawsbuck
SAWSBUCK.pokedex: The plants growing on its horns change according to the season. The leaders of the herd possess magnificent horns.

EMOLGA.name: Emolga
EMOLGA.pokedex: They live on treetops and glide using the inside of a cape-like membrane while discharging electricity.

KARRABLAST.name: Karrablast
KARRABLAST.pokedex: When they feel threatened, they spit an acidic liquid to drive attackers away. This Pokémon targets Shelmet.

ESCAVALIER.name: Escavalier
ESCAVALIER.pokedex: These Pokémon evolve by wearing the shell covering of a Shelmet. The steel armor protects their whole body.

FOONGUS.name: Foongus
FOONGUS.pokedex: For some reason, this Pokémon resembles a Poké Ball. They release poison spores to repel those who try to catch them.

AMOONGUSS.name: Amoonguss
AMOONGUSS.pokedex: They show off their Poké Ball caps to lure prey, but very few Pokémon are fooled by this.

FRILLISH.name: Frillish
FRILLISH.pokedex: They paralyze prey with poison, then drag them down to their lairs, five miles below the surface.

JELLICENT.name: Jellicent
JELLICENT.pokedex: They propel themselves by expelling absorbed seawater from their bodies. Their favorite food is life energy.

ALOMOMOLA.name: Alomomola
ALOMOMOLA.pokedex: Floating in the open sea is how they live. When they find a wounded Pokémon, they embrace it and bring it to shore.

JOLTIK.name: Joltik
JOLTIK.pokedex: They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch.

GALVANTULA.name: Galvantula
GALVANTULA.pokedex: They employ an electrically charged web to trap their prey. While it is immobilized by shock, they leisurely consume it.

FERROSEED.name: Ferroseed
FERROSEED.pokedex: They stick their spikes into cave walls and absorb the minerals they find in the rock.

FERROTHORN.name: Ferrothorn
FERROTHORN.pokedex: They attach themselves to cave ceilings, firing steel spikes at targets passing beneath them.

KLINK.name: Klink
KLINK.pokedex: Interlocking two bodies and spinning around generates the energy they need to live.

KLANG.name: Klang
KLANG.pokedex: Spinning minigears are rotated at high speed and repeatedly fired away. It is dangerous if the gears don't return.

KLINKLANG.name: Klinklang
KLINKLANG.pokedex: The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.

TYNAMO.name: Tynamo
TYNAMO.pokedex: These Pokémon move in schools. They have an electricity-generating organ, so they discharge electricity if in danger.

EELEKTRIK.name: Eelektrik
EELEKTRIK.pokedex: These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity.

EELEKTROSS.name: Eelektross
EELEKTROSS.pokedex: With their sucker mouths, they suck in prey. Then they use their fangs to shock the prey with electricity.

ELGYEM.name: Elgyem
ELGYEM.pokedex: This Pokémon had never been seen until it appeared from far in the desert 50 years ago.

BEHEEYEM.name: Beheeyem
BEHEEYEM.pokedex: It uses psychic power to control an opponent's brain and tamper with its memories.

LITWICK.name: Litwick
LITWICK.pokedex: While shining a light and pretending to be a guide, it leeches off the life force of any who follow it.

LAMPENT.name: Lampent
LAMPENT.pokedex: It arrives near the moment of death and steals spirit from the body.

CHANDELURE.name: Chandelure
CHANDELURE.pokedex: Being consumed in Chandelure's flame burns up the spirit, leaving the body behind.

AXEW.name: Axew
AXEW.pokedex: They mark their territory by leaving gashes in trees with their tusks. If a tusk breaks, a new one grows in quickly.

FRAXURE.name: Fraxure
FRAXURE.pokedex: Their tusks can shatter rocks. Territory battles between Fraxure can be intensely violent.

HAXORUS.name: Haxorus
HAXORUS.pokedex: Their sturdy tusks will stay sharp even if used to cut steel beams. These Pokémon are covered in hard armor.

CUBCHOO.name: Cubchoo
CUBCHOO.pokedex: Its nose is always running. It sniffs the snot back up because the mucus provides the raw material for its moves.

BEARTIC.name: Beartic
BEARTIC.pokedex: It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.

CRYOGONAL.name: Cryogonal
CRYOGONAL.pokedex: They are born in snow clouds. They use chains made of ice crystals to capture prey.

SHELMET.name: Shelmet
SHELMET.pokedex: It evolves when bathed in an electric-like energy along with Karrablast. The reason is still unknown.

ACCELGOR.name: Accelgor
ACCELGOR.pokedex: Having removed its heavy shell, it becomes very light and can fight with ninja-like movements.

STUNFISK.name: Stunfisk
STUNFISK.pokedex: It conceals itself in the mud of the seashore. Then it waits. When prey touch it, it delivers a jolt of energy.

MIENFOO.name: Mienfoo
MIENFOO.pokedex: They have mastered elegant combos. As they concentrate, their battle moves become swifter and more precise.

MIENSHAO.name: Mienshao
MIENSHAO.pokedex: They use the long fur on their arms as a whip to strike their opponents.

DRUDDIGON.name: Druddigon
DRUDDIGON.pokedex: It races through narrow caves, using its sharp claws to catch prey. Then skin on its face is harder than a rock.

GOLETT.name: Golett
GOLETT.pokedex: These Pokémon are thought to have been created by the science of an ancient and mysterious civilization.

GOLURK.name: Golurk
GOLURK.pokedex: It is said that Golurk were ordered to protect people and Pokémon by the ancient people who made them.

PAWNIARD.name: Pawniard
PAWNIARD.pokedex: They fight at Bisharp's command. They cling to their prey and inflict damage by sinking their blades into it.

BISHARP.name: Bisharp
BISHARP.pokedex: Bisharp pursues prey in the company of a large group of Pawniard. Then Bisharp finishes off the prey.

BOUFFALANT.name: Bouffalant
BOUFFALANT.pokedex: They charge wildly and headbutt everything. They headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a train.

RUFFLET.name: Rufflet
RUFFLET.pokedex: They will challenge anything, even strong opponents, without fear. Their frequent fights help them become stronger.

BRAVIARY.name: Braviary
BRAVIARY.pokedex: The more scars they have, the more respect these brave soldiers of the sky get from their peers.

VULLABY.name: Vullaby
VULLABY.pokedex: They tend to guard their posteriors with suitable bones they have found. They pursue weak Pokémon.

MANDIBUZZ.name: Mandibuzz
MANDIBUZZ.pokedex: Watching from the sky, they swoop to strike weakened Pokémon on the ground. They decorate themselves with bones.

HEATMOR.name: Heatmor
HEATMOR.pokedex: Using their very hot, flame-covered tongues, they burn through Durant's steel bodies and consume their insides.

DURANT.name: Durant
DURANT.pokedex: Durant dig nests in mountains. They build their complicated, interconnected tunnels in mazes.

DEINO.name: Deino
DEINO.pokedex: They cannot see, so they tackle and bite to learn about their surroundings. Their bodies are covered in wounds.

ZWEILOUS.name: Zweilous
ZWEILOUS.pokedex: Since their two heads do not get along and compete with each other for food, they always eat too much.

HYDREIGON.name: Hydreigon
HYDREIGON.pokedex: The heads on their arms do not have brains. They use all three heads to consume and destroy everything.

LARVESTA.name: Larvesta
LARVESTA.pokedex: The base of volcanoes is where they make their homes. They shoot fire from their five horns to repel attacking enemies.

VOLCARONA.name: Volcarona
VOLCARONA.pokedex: A sea of fire engulfs the surroundings of their battles, since they use their six wings to scatter their ember scales.

COBALION.name: Cobalion
COBALION.pokedex: It has a body and heart of steel. Its glare is sufficient to make even an unruly Pokémon obey it.

TERRAKION.name: Terrakion
TERRAKION.pokedex: Its charge is strong enough to break through a giant castle wall in one blow. This Pokémon is spoken of in legends.

VIRIZION.name: Virizion
VIRIZION.pokedex: Its head sprouts horns as sharp as blades. Using whirlwind-like movements, it confounds and swiftly cuts opponents.

TORNADUS.name: Tornadus
TORNADUS.pokedex: Tornadus expels massive energy from its tail, causing severe storms. Its power is great enough to blow houses away.

THUNDURUS.name: Thundurus
THUNDURUS.pokedex: The spikes on its tail discharge immense bolts of lightning. It flies around the Unova region firing off lightning bolts.

RESHIRAM.name: Reshiram
RESHIRAM.pokedex: When Reshiram's tail flares, the heat energy moves the atmosphere and changes the world's weather.

ZEKROM.name: Zekrom
ZEKROM.pokedex: This Pokémon appears in legends. In its tail, it has a giant generator that creates electricity.

LANDORUS.name: Landorus
LANDORUS.pokedex: The energy that comes pouring from its tail increases the nutrition in the soil, making crops grow to great size.

KYUREM.name: Kyurem
KYUREM.pokedex: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.

KELDEO.name: Keldeo
KELDEO.pokedex: It crosses the world, running over the surfaces of oceans and rivers. It appears at scenic waterfronts.

MELOETTA.name: Meloetta
MELOETTA.pokedex: Many famous songs have been inspired by the melodies that Meloetta plays.

GENESECT.name: Genesect
GENESECT.pokedex: This ancient bug Pokémon was altered by Team Plasma. They upgraded the cannon on its back.

CHESPIN.name: Chespin
CHESPIN.pokedex: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.

QUILLADIN.name: Quilladin
QUILLADIN.pokedex: They strengthen their lower bodies by running into one another. They are very kind and won't start fights.

CHESNAUGHT.name: Chesnaught
CHESNAUGHT.pokedex: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.

FENNEKIN.name: Fennekin
FENNEKIN.pokedex: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.

BRAIXEN.name: Braixen
BRAIXEN.pokedex: When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.

DELPHOX.name: Delphox
DELPHOX.pokedex: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.

FROAKIE.name: Froakie
FROAKIE.pokedex: It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.

FROGADIER.name: Frogadier
FROGADIER.pokedex: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.

GRENINJA.name: Greninja
GRENINJA.pokedex: It appears and vanishes with a ninja's grace. It toys with its enemies using swift movements, while slicing them with throwing stars of sharpest water.

BUNNELBY.name: Bunnelby
BUNNELBY.pokedex: It has ears like shovels. Digging holes strengthens its ears so much that they can sever thick roots effortlessly.

DIGGERSBY.name: Diggersby
DIGGERSBY.pokedex: As powerful as an excavator, its ears can reduce dense bedrock to rubble. When it's finished digging, it lounges lazily.

FLETCHLING.name: Fletchling
FLETCHLING.pokedex: These friendly Pokémon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.

FLETCHINDER.name: Fletchinder
FLETCHINDER.pokedex: From its beak, it expels embers that set the tall grass on fire. Then it pounces on the bewildered prey that pop out of the grass.

TALONFLAME.name: Talonflame
TALONFLAME.pokedex: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.

SCATTERBUG.name: Scatterbug
SCATTERBUG.pokedex: When under attack from bird Pokémon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact.

SPEWPA.name: Spewpa
SPEWPA.pokedex: It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body in an effort to threaten them.

VIVILLON.name: Vivillon
VIVILLON.pokedex: Vivillon with many different patterns are found all over the world. These patterns are affected by the climate of their habitat.

LITLEO.name: Litleo
LITLEO.pokedex: They set off on their own from their pride and live by themselves to become stronger. These hot-blooded Pokémon are quick to fight.

PYROAR.name: Pyroar
PYROAR.pokedex: With fiery breath of more than 6,000 degrees Celsius, they viciously threaten any challenger. The females protect the pride's cubs.

FLABEBE.name: Flabébé
FLABEBE.pokedex: When it finds a flower it likes, it dwells on that flower its whole life long. It floats in the wind's embrace with an untroubled heart.

FLOETTE.name: Floette
FLOETTE.pokedex: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the power of flowers to battle.

FLORGES.name: Florges
FLORGES.pokedex: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.

SKIDDO.name: Skiddo
SKIDDO.pokedex: If it has sunshine and water, it doesn't need to eat, because it can generate energy from the leaves on its back.

GOGOAT.name: Gogoat
GOGOAT.pokedex: It can tell how its trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathetic sense lets them run as if one being.

PANCHAM.name: Pancham
PANCHAM.pokedex: It does its best to be taken seriously by its enemies, but its glare is not sufficiently intimidating. Chewing on a leaf is its trademark.

PANGORO.name: Pangoro
PANGORO.pokedex: It charges ahead and bashes its opponents like a berserker, uncaring about any hits it might take. Its arms are mighty enough to snap a telephone pole.

FURFROU.name: Furfrou
FURFROU.pokedex: Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases the swiftness of its movements.

ESPURR.name: Espurr
ESPURR.pokedex: The organ that emits its intense psychic power is sheltered by its ears to keep power from leaking out.

MEOWSTIC.name: Meowstic
MEOWSTIC.pokedex: Revealing the eyelike patterns on the insides of its ears will unleash its psychic powers. It normally keeps the patterns hidden, however.

HONEDGE.name: Honedge
HONEDGE.pokedex: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.

DOUBLADE.name: Doublade
DOUBLADE.pokedex: The complex attack patterns of its two swords are unstoppable, even for an opponent greatly accomplished at swordplay.

AEGISLASH.name: Aegislash
AEGISLASH.pokedex: In this defensive stance, Aegislash uses its steel body and a force field of spectral power to reduce the damage of any attack.

SPRITZEE.name: Spritzee
SPRITZEE.pokedex: It emits a scent that enraptures those who smell it. This fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten.

AROMATISSE.name: Aromatisse
AROMATISSE.pokedex: It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.

SWIRLIX.name: Swirlix
SWIRLIX.pokedex: To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy.

SLURPUFF.name: Slurpuff
SLURPUFF.pokedex: It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sensitive sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs in their work.

INKAY.name: Inkay
INKAY.pokedex: It flashes the light-emitting spots on its body, which drains its opponent's will to fight. It takes the opportunity to scuttle away and hide.

MALAMAR.name: Malamar
MALAMAR.pokedex: It lures prey close with hypnotic motions, then wraps its tentacles around it before finishing it off with digestive fluids.

BINACLE.name: Binacle
BINACLE.pokedex: They stretch and then contract, yanking their rocks along with them in bold hops. They eat seaweed that washes up on the shoreline.

BARBARACLE.name: Barbaracle
BARBARACLE.pokedex: Barbaracle's legs and hands have minds of their own, and they will move independently. But they usually follow the head's orders.

SKRELP.name: Skrelp
SKRELP.pokedex: Camouflaged as rotten kelp, they spray liquid poison on prey that approaches unawares and then finish it off.

DRAGALGE.name: Dragalge
DRAGALGE.pokedex: Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory.

CLAUNCHER.name: Clauncher
CLAUNCHER.pokedex: Through controlled expulsions of internal gas, it can expel water like a pistol shot. At close distances, it can shatter rock.

CLAWITZER.name: Clawitzer
CLAWITZER.pokedex: By expelling water from the nozzle in the back of its claw, it can move at a speed of 60 knots.

HELIOPTILE.name: Helioptile
HELIOPTILE.pokedex: They make their home in deserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement.

HELIOLISK.name: Heliolisk
HELIOLISK.pokedex: They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.

TYRUNT.name: Tyrunt
TYRUNT.pokedex: Its immense jaws have enough destructive force that it can chew up an automobile. It lived 100 million years ago.

TYRANTRUM.name: Tyrantrum
TYRANTRUM.pokedex: Thanks to its gargantuan jaws, which could shred thick metal plates as if they were paper, it was invincible in the ancient world it once inhabited.

AMAURA.name: Amaura
AMAURA.pokedex: This ancient Pokémon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen in ice for over 100 million years.

AURORUS.name: Aurorus
AURORUS.pokedex: Using its diamond-shaped crystals, it can instantly create a wall of ice to block an opponent's attack.

SYLVEON.name: Sylveon
SYLVEON.pokedex: Its ribbonlike feelers give off an aura that weakens hostility in its prey, causing them to let down their guard. Then it attacks.

HAWLUCHA.name: Hawlucha
HAWLUCHA.pokedex: With its wings, it controls its position in the air. It likes to attack from above, a maneuver that is difficult to defend against.

DEDENNE.name: Dedenne
DEDENNE.pokedex: Its whiskers serve as antennas. By sending and receiving electrical waves, it can communicate with others over vast distances.

CARBINK.name: Carbink
CARBINK.pokedex: Born from the high temperatures and pressures deep underground, it defends itself by firing beams from the jewel part of its body.

GOOMY.name: Goomy
GOOMY.pokedex: Its source of protection is its slimy, germ-laden mucous membrane. Anyone who touches it needs some thorough hand-washing.

SLIGGOO.name: Sliggoo
SLIGGOO.pokedex: This Pokémon's mucous can dissolve anything. Toothless, it sprays mucous on its prey. Once they're nicely dissolved, it slurps them up.

GOODRA.name: Goodra
GOODRA.pokedex: It gets picked on because it's meek. But then, whoever teased it gets to feel the full force of its horns and a good swatting from its thick tail.

KLEFKI.name: Klefki
KLEFKI.pokedex: It never lets go of a key that it likes, so people give it the keys to vaults and safes as a way to prevent crime.

PHANTUMP.name: Phantump
PHANTUMP.pokedex: These Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who died in the forest. Their cries sound like eerie screams.

TREVENANT.name: Trevenant
TREVENANT.pokedex: Through its roots, it exerts control over other trees. A deadly curse falls upon anyone cutting down trees in forests where Trevenant dwell.

PUMPKABOO.name: Pumpkaboo
PUMPKABOO.pokedex: When taking spirits to the afterlife, small Pumpkaboo prefer the spirits of children to those of adults.

GOURGEIST.name: Gourgeist
GOURGEIST.pokedex: Small Gourgeist pretend to be children to fool adults. Anyone who falls for the act gets carried away to the hereafter.

BERGMITE.name: Bergmite
BERGMITE.pokedex: It blocks opponents' attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice.

AVALUGG.name: Avalugg
AVALUGG.pokedex: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.

NOIBAT.name: Noibat
NOIBAT.pokedex: Even a robust wrestler will become dizzy and unable to stand when exposed to its 200,000-hertz ultrasonic waves.

NOIVERN.name: Noivern
NOIVERN.pokedex: They fly around on moonless nights and attack careless prey. Nothing can beat them in a battle in the dark.

XERNEAS.name: Xerneas
XERNEAS.pokedex: Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival.

YVELTAL.name: Yveltal
YVELTAL.pokedex: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.

ZYGARDE.name: Zygarde
ZYGARDE.pokedex: It's thought to be monitoring the ecosystem. There are rumors that even greater power lies hidden within it.

DIANCIE.name: Diancie
DIANCIE.pokedex: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

HOOPA.name: Hoopa
HOOPA.pokedex: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.

VOLCANION.name: Volcanion
VOLCANION.pokedex: It lets out billows of steam and disappears into the dense fog. It's said to live in mountains where humans do not tread.

ROWLET.name: Rowlet
ROWLET.pokedex: It sends its feathers, which are as sharp as blades, flying in attack. Its legs are strong, so its kicks are also formidable.

DARTRIX.name: Dartrix
DARTRIX.pokedex: A bit of a dandy, it spends its free time preening its wings. Its preoccupation with any dirt on its plumage can leave it unable to battle.

DECIDUEYE.name: Decidueye
DECIDUEYE.pokedex: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards.

LITTEN.name: Litten
LITTEN.pokedex: Its coat regrows twice a year. When the time comes, Litten sets its own body on fire and burns away the old fur.

TORRACAT.name: Torracat
TORRACAT.pokedex: It can act spoiled if it grows close to its Trainer. A powerful Pokémon, its sharp claws can leave its Trainer's whole body covered in scratches.

INCINEROAR.name: Incineroar
INCINEROAR.pokedex: Although it's rough mannered and egotistical, it finds beating down unworthy opponents boring. It gets motivated for stronger opponents.

POPPLIO.name: Popplio
POPPLIO.pokedex: This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It's famous for being a hard worker.

BRIONNE.name: Brionne
BRIONNE.pokedex: It gets excited when it sees a dance it doesn't know. This hard worker practices diligently until it can learn that dance.

PRIMARINA.name: Primarina
PRIMARINA.pokedex: It controls its water balloons with song. The melody is learned from others of its kind and is passed down from one generation to the next.

PIKIPEK.name: Pikipek
PIKIPEK.pokedex: It pecks at trees with its hard beak. You can get some idea of its mood or condition from the rhythm of its pecking.

TRUMBEAK.name: Trumbeak
TRUMBEAK.pokedex: It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst.

TOUCANNON.name: Toucannon
TOUCANNON.pokedex: They smack beaks with others of their kind to communicate. The strength and number of hits tell each other how they feel.

YUNGOOS.name: Yungoos
YUNGOOS.pokedex: Its stomach takes up most of its long torso. It's a big eater, so the amount Trainers have to spend on its food is no laughing matter.

GUMSHOOS.name: Gumshoos
GUMSHOOS.pokedex: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location... but it's always snoozing by nightfall.

GRUBBIN.name: Grubbin
GRUBBIN.pokedex: It spits a sticky thread to stop opponents in their tracks, and then it grabs them in its sharp, sturdy mandibles to take them down.

CHARJABUG.name: Charjabug
CHARJABUG.pokedex: It buries itself in fallen leaves and barely moves, munching away on humus. If you accidentally step on one, you'll get a shock!

VIKAVOLT.name: Vikavolt
VIKAVOLT.pokedex: It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies.

CRABRAWLER.name: Crabrawler
CRABRAWLER.pokedex: It punches so much, its pincers often come off from overuse, but they grow back quickly. What little meat they contain is rich and delicious.

CRABOMINABLE.name: Crabominable
CRABOMINABLE.pokedex: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved and grew fur.

ORICORIO.name: Oricorio
ORICORIO.pokedex: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.

CUTIEFLY.name: Cutiefly
CUTIEFLY.pokedex: It feeds on the nectar and pollen of flowers. Because it's able to sense auras, it can identify which flowers are about to bloom.

RIBOMBEE.name: Ribombee
RIBOMBEE.pokedex: Rain makes pollen damp, so Ribombee hates rain. When it sees ominous clouds, it finds a hollow in a tree, where it waits stock-still.

ROCKRUFF.name: Rockruff
ROCKRUFF.pokedex: This Pokémon has lived with people since times long ago. It can sense when its Trainer is in the dumps and will stick close by its Trainer's side.

LYCANROC.name: Lycanroc
LYCANROC.pokedex: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.

WISHIWASHI.name: Wishiwashi
WISHIWASHI.pokedex: It's awfully weak and notably tasty, so everyone is always out to get it. As it happens, anyone trying to bully it receives a painful lesson.

MAREANIE.name: Mareanie
MAREANIE.pokedex: It plunges the poison spike on its head into its prey. When the prey has weakened, Mareanie deals the finishing blow with its 10 tentacles.

TOXAPEX.name: Toxapex
TOXAPEX.pokedex: Those attacked by Toxapex's poison will suffer intense pain for three days and three nights. Post-recovery, there will be some aftereffects.

MUDBRAY.name: Mudbray
MUDBRAY.pokedex: It loves playing in the mud. If it isn't showered with mud on a daily basis, it gets stressed out and stops listening to its Trainer.

MUDSDALE.name: Mudsdale
MUDSDALE.pokedex: It remains calm and unmoving no matter the situation. It mixes dirt with the saliva in its mouth to make a special kind of mud.

DEWPIDER.name: Dewpider
DEWPIDER.pokedex: When two Dewpider meet, they display their water bubbles to each other. Then the one with the smaller bubble gets out of the other's way.

ARAQUANID.name: Araquanid
ARAQUANID.pokedex: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokémon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.

FOMANTIS.name: Fomantis
FOMANTIS.pokedex: When the sun rises, Fomantis spreads its four leaves and bathes in the sunlight. The tip of its head has a pleasant aroma.

LURANTIS.name: Lurantis
LURANTIS.pokedex: It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis's vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby.

MORELULL.name: Morelull
MORELULL.pokedex: It scatters its shining spores around itself. Even though they're dangerous, nighttime tours of forests where Morelull live are popular.

SHIINOTIC.name: Shiinotic
SHIINOTIC.pokedex: It puts its prey to sleep and siphons off their vitality through the tip of its arms. If one of its kind is weakened, it helps by sending it vitality.

SALANDIT.name: Salandit
SALANDIT.pokedex: It burns its bodily fluids to create a poisonous gas. When its enemies become disoriented from inhaling the gas, it attacks them.

SALAZZLE.name: Salazzle
SALAZZLE.pokedex: Filled with pheromones, its poisonous gas can be diluted to use in the production of luscious perfumes.

STUFFUL.name: Stufful
STUFFUL.pokedex: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.

BEWEAR.name: Bewear
BEWEAR.pokedex: It waves its hands wildly in intimidation and warning. Life is over for anyone who doesn't run away as fast as possible.

BOUNSWEET.name: Bounsweet
BOUNSWEET.pokedex: Because of its sweet, delicious aroma, bird Pokémon are always after it, but it's not intelligent enough to care.

STEENEE.name: Steenee
STEENEE.pokedex: It's protected by its hard sepals, so it plays with bird Pokémon without worry. They peck it relentlessly, but it doesn't care.

TSAREENA.name: Tsareena
TSAREENA.pokedex: A Pokémon with an aggressive personality and a mastery of kicking, it cackles every time it kicks an opponent.

COMFEY.name: Comfey
COMFEY.pokedex: Baths prepared with the flowers from its vine have a relaxing effect, so this Pokémon is a hit with many people.

ORANGURU.name: Oranguru
ORANGURU.pokedex: It normally spends its time meditating in the treetops. It throws Poké Balls and gives other Pokémon orders as it pleases.

PASSIMIAN.name: Passimian
PASSIMIAN.pokedex: Berries are its weapons as well as the staple of its diet. The one that can throw a berry the farthest is the boss of the troop.

WIMPOD.name: Wimpod
WIMPOD.pokedex: This Pokémon is a coward. As it desperately dashes off, the flailing of its many legs leaves a sparkling clean path in its wake.

GOLISOPOD.name: Golisopod
GOLISOPOD.pokedex: It battles skillfully with its six arms, but spends most of its time peacefully meditating in caves deep beneath the sea.

SANDYGAST.name: Sandygast
SANDYGAST.pokedex: It likes the shovel on its head, so Sandygast will get serious and fight any children who come to take it back.

PALOSSAND.name: Palossand
PALOSSAND.pokedex: Buried beneath the castle are masses of dried-up bones from those whose vitality it has drained.

PYUKUMUKU.name: Pyukumuku
PYUKUMUKU.pokedex: It lives in shallow seas, such as areas near a beach. It can eject its internal organs, which it uses to engulf its prey or battle enemies.

TYPENULL.name: Type: Null
TYPENULL.pokedex: The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its intrinsic capabilities. This Pokémon has some hidden special power.

SILVALLY.name: Silvally
SILVALLY.pokedex: Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokémon is capable of changing its type, a flexibility that is well displayed in battle.

MINIOR.name: Minior
MINIOR.pokedex: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.

KOMALA.name: Komala
KOMALA.pokedex: It remains asleep from birth to death as a result of the sedative properties of the leaves that form its diet.

TURTONATOR.name: Turtonator
TURTONATOR.pokedex: It lives in volcanoes and eats sulfur and other minerals. Materials from the food it eats form the basis of its explosive shell.

TOGEDEMARU.name: Togedemaru
TOGEDEMARU.pokedex: The long hairs on its back act as lightning rods. The bolts of lightning it attracts are stored as energy in its electric sac.

MIMIKYU.name: Mimikyu
MIMIKYU.pokedex: A lonely Pokémon, it conceals its terrifying appearance beneath an old rag so it can get closer to people and other Pokémon.

BRUXISH.name: Bruxish
BRUXISH.pokedex: When it unleashes its psychic power from the protuberance on its head, the grating sound of grinding teeth echoes through the area.

DRAMPA.name: Drampa
DRAMPA.pokedex: This Pokémon is friendly to people and loves children most of all. It comes from deep in the mountains to play with children it likes in town.

DHELMISE.name: Dhelmise
DHELMISE.pokedex: The soul of seaweed adrift in the waves became reborn as this Pokémon. It maintains itself with new infusions of seabed detritus and seaweed.

JANGMOO.name: Jangmo-o
JANGMOO.pokedex: It expresses its feelings by smacking its scales. Metallic sounds echo through the tall mountains where Jangmo-o lives.

HAKAMOO.name: Hakamo-o
HAKAMOO.pokedex: It sheds and regrows its scales on a continuous basis. The scales become harder and sharper each time they're regrown.

KOMMOO.name: Kommo-o
KOMMOO.pokedex: Its rigid scales function as offense and defense. In the past, its scales were processed and used to make weapons and other commodities.

TAPUKOKO.name: Tapu Koko
TAPUKOKO.pokedex: Although it's called a guardian deity, if a person or Pokémon puts it in a bad mood, it will become a malevolent deity and attack.

TAPULELE.name: Tapu Lele
TAPULELE.pokedex: As it flutters about, it scatters its strangely glowing scales. Touching them is said to restore good health on the spot.

TAPUBULU.name: Tapu Bulu
TAPUBULU.pokedex: It pulls large trees up by the roots and swings them around. It causes vegetation to grow, and then it absorbs energy from the growth.

TAPUFINI.name: Tapu Fini
TAPUFINI.pokedex: The dense fog it creates brings the downfall and destruction of its confused enemies. Ocean currents are the source of its energy.

COSMOG.name: Cosmog
COSMOG.pokedex: Whether or not it's a Pokémon from this world is a mystery. When it's in a jam, it warps away to a safe place to hide.

COSMOEM.name: Cosmoem
COSMOEM.pokedex: Motionless as if dead, its body is faintly warm to the touch. In the distant past, it was called the cocoon of the stars.

SOLGALEO.name: Solgaleo
SOLGALEO.pokedex: It is said to live in another world. The intense light it radiates from the surface of its body can make the darkest of nights light up like midday.

LUNALA.name: Lunala
LUNALA.pokedex: Said to live in another world, this Pokémon devours light, drawing the moonless dark veil of night over the brightness of day.

NIHILEGO.name: Nihilego
NIHILEGO.pokedex: One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent.

BUZZWOLE.name: Buzzwole
BUZZWOLE.pokedex: This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear.

PHEROMOSA.name: Pheromosa
PHEROMOSA.pokedex: One of the Ultra Beasts. It refuses to touch anything, perhaps because it senses some uncleanness in this world.

XURKITREE.name: Xurkitree
XURKITREE.pokedex: One of the mysterious life-forms known as Ultra Beasts. Astonishing electric shocks emanate from its entire body, according to witnesses.

CELESTEELA.name: Celesteela
CELESTEELA.pokedex: One kind of Ultra Beast. Witnesses have seen it burn down a forest by expelling gas from its two arms.

KARTANA.name: Kartana
KARTANA.pokedex: One of the Ultra Beast life-forms, it was observed cutting down a gigantic steel tower with one stroke of its blade.

GUZZLORD.name: Guzzlord
GUZZLORD.pokedex: A dangerous Ultra Beast, it appears to be eating constantly, but for some reason its droppings have never been found.

NECROZMA.name: Necrozma
NECROZMA.pokedex: Light is apparently the source of its energy. It has an extraordinarily vicious disposition and is constantly firing off laser beams.

MAGEARNA.name: Magearna
MAGEARNA.pokedex: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.

MARSHADOW.name: Marshadow
MARSHADOW.pokedex: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.

POIPOLE.name: Poipole
POIPOLE.pokedex: An Ultra Beast that lives in a different world, it cackles wildly as it sprays its opponents with poison from the needles on its head.

NAGANADEL.name: Naganadel
NAGANADEL.pokedex: One kind of Ultra Beast, it fires a glowing, venomous liquid from its needles. This liquid is also immensely adhesive.

STAKATAKA.name: Stakataka
STAKATAKA.pokedex: When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute's true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.

BLACEPHALON.name: Blacephalon
BLACEPHALON.pokedex: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It's apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.

ZERAORA.name: Zeraora
ZERAORA.pokedex: It approaches its enemies at the speed of lightning, then tears them limb from limb with its sharp claws.

MELTAN.name: Meltan
MELTAN.pokedex: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.

MELMETAL.name: Melmetal
MELMETAL.pokedex: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.

GROOKEY.name: Grookey
GROOKEY.pokedex: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.

THWACKEY.name: Thwackey
THWACKEY.pokedex: When it's drumming out rapid beats in battle, it gets so caught up in the rhythm that it won't even notice that it's already knocked out its opponent.

RILLABOOM.name: Rillaboom
RILLABOOM.pokedex: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.

SCORBUNNY.name: Scorbunny
SCORBUNNY.pokedex: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon's body. Once that happens, it's ready to fight at full power.

RABOOT.name: Raboot
RABOOT.pokedex: It kicks berries right off the branches of trees and then juggles them with its feet, practicing its footwork.

CINDERACE.name: Cinderace
CINDERACE.pokedex: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.

SOBBLE.name: Sobble
SOBBLE.pokedex: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won't be able to resist weeping.

DRIZZILE.name: Drizzile
DRIZZILE.pokedex: A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.

INTELEON.name: Inteleon
INTELEON.pokedex: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.

SKWOVET.name: Skwovet
SKWOVET.pokedex: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It'll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries.

GREEDENT.name: Greedent
GREEDENT.pokedex: It stashes berries in its tail - so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn't notice the loss.

ROOKIDEE.name: Rookidee
ROOKIDEE.pokedex: Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.

CORVISQUIRE.name: Corvisquire
CORVISQUIRE.pokedex: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.

CORVIKNIGHT.name: Corviknight
CORVIKNIGHT.pokedex: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.

BLIPBUG.name: Blipbug
BLIPBUG.pokedex: Often found in gardens, this Pokémon has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings.

DOTTLER.name: Dottler
DOTTLER.pokedex: It barely moves, but it's still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers.

ORBEETLE.name: Orbeetle
ORBEETLE.pokedex: It's famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.

NICKIT.name: Nickit
NICKIT.pokedex: Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains.

THIEVUL.name: Thievul
THIEVUL.pokedex: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.

GOSSIFLEUR.name: Gossifleur
GOSSIFLEUR.pokedex: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.

ELDEGOSS.name: Eldegoss
ELDEGOSS.pokedex: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.

WOOLOO.name: Wooloo
WOOLOO.pokedex: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.

DUBWOOL.name: Dubwool
DUBWOOL.pokedex: Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle.

CHEWTLE.name: Chewtle
CHEWTLE.pokedex: It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.

DREDNAW.name: Drednaw
DREDNAW.pokedex: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.

YAMPER.name: Yamper
YAMPER.pokedex: This gluttonous Pokémon only assists people with their work because it wants treats. As it runs, it crackles with electricity.

BOLTUND.name: Boltund
BOLTUND.pokedex: This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days.

ROLYCOLY.name: Rolycoly
ROLYCOLY.pokedex: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.

CARKOL.name: Carkol
CARKOL.pokedex: By rapidly rolling its legs, it can travel at over 18 mph. The temperature of the flames it breathes exceeds 1,000 degrees Celsius.

COALOSSAL.name: Coalossal
COALOSSAL.pokedex: While it's engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, sending off sparks that scorch the surrounding area.

APPLIN.name: Applin
APPLIN.pokedex: It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it's just an apple and nothing more.

FLAPPLE.name: Flapple
FLAPPLE.pokedex: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.

APPLETUN.name: Appletun
APPLETUN.pokedex: Its body is covered in sweet nectar, and the skin on its back is especially yummy. Children used to have it as a snack.

SILICOBRA.name: Silicobra
SILICOBRA.pokedex: It spews sand from its nostrils. While the enemy is blinded, it burrows into the ground to hide.

SANDACONDA.name: Sandaconda
SANDACONDA.pokedex: Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently.

CRAMORANT.name: Cramorant
CRAMORANT.pokedex: It's so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it's battling midfight.

ARROKUDA.name: Arrokuda
ARROKUDA.pokedex: If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It's very proud of that jaw.

BARRASKEWDA.name: Barraskewda
BARRASKEWDA.pokedex: This Pokémon has a jaw that's as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda's flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.

TOXEL.name: Toxel
TOXEL.pokedex: It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis.

TOXTRICITY.name: Toxtricity
TOXTRICITY.pokedex: When this Pokémon sounds as if it's strumming a guitar, it's actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.

SIZZLIPEDE.name: Sizzlipede
SIZZLIPEDE.pokedex: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.

CENTISKORCH.name: Centiskorch
CENTISKORCH.pokedex: While its burning body is already dangerous on its own, this excessively hostile Pokémon also has large and very sharp fangs.

CLOBBOPUS.name: Clobbopus
CLOBBOPUS.pokedex: It's very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.

GRAPPLOCT.name: Grapploct
GRAPPLOCT.pokedex: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.

SINISTEA.name: Sinistea
SINISTEA.pokedex: The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.

POLTEAGEIST.name: Polteageist
POLTEAGEIST.pokedex: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.

HATENNA.name: Hatenna
HATENNA.pokedex: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures' emotions. If you don't have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.

HATTREM.name: Hattrem
HATTREM.pokedex: Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer.

HATTERENE.name: Hatterene
HATTERENE.pokedex: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.

IMPIDIMP.name: Impidimp
IMPIDIMP.pokedex: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.

MORGREM.name: Morgrem
MORGREM.pokedex: With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.

GRIMMSNARL.name: Grimmsnarl
GRIMMSNARL.pokedex: Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would.

OBSTAGOON.name: Obstagoon
OBSTAGOON.pokedex: It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make any opponent flinch.

PERRSERKER.name: Perrserker
PERRSERKER.pokedex: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

CURSOLA.name: Cursola
CURSOLA.pokedex: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon's core spirit.

SIRFETCHD.name: Sirfetch'd
SIRFETCHD.pokedex: After deflecting attacks with its hard leaf shield, it strikes back with its sharp leek stalk. The leek stalk is both weapon and food.

MRRIME.name: Mr. Rime
MRRIME.pokedex: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.

RUNERIGUS.name: Runerigus
RUNERIGUS.pokedex: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move.

MILCERY.name: Milcery
MILCERY.pokedex: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.

ALCREMIE.name: Alcremie
ALCREMIE.pokedex: When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.

FALINKS.name: Falinks
FALINKS.pokedex: The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight.

PINCURCHIN.name: Pincurchin
PINCURCHIN.pokedex: It stores electricity in each spine. Even if one gets broken off, it still continues to emit electricity for at least three hours.

SNOM.name: Snom
SNOM.pokedex: It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.

FROSMOTH.name: Frosmoth
FROSMOTH.pokedex: It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.

STONJOURNER.name: Stonjourner
STONJOURNER.pokedex: Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.

EISCUE.name: Eiscue
EISCUE.pokedex: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.

INDEEDEE.name: Indeedee
INDEEDEE.pokedex: It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need.

MORPEKO.name: Morpeko
MORPEKO.pokedex: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It's also generating electricity.

CUFANT.name: Cufant
CUFANT.pokedex: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It's also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.

COPPERAJAH.name: Copperajah
COPPERAJAH.pokedex: These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks into powder.

DRACOZOLT.name: Dracozolt
DRACOZOLT.pokedex: In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources.

ARCTOZOLT.name: Arctozolt
ARCTOZOLT.pokedex: The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.

DRACOVISH.name: Dracovish
DRACOVISH.pokedex: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.

ARCTOVISH.name: Arctovish
ARCTOVISH.pokedex: Though it's able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head.

DURALUDON.name: Duraludon
DURALUDON.pokedex: Its body resembles polished metal, and it's both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.

DREEPY.name: Dreepy
DREEPY.pokedex: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.

DRAKLOAK.name: Drakloak
DRAKLOAK.pokedex: It's capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve.

DRAGAPULT.name: Dragapult
DRAGAPULT.pokedex: When it isn't battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.

ZACIAN.name: Zacian
ZACIAN.pokedex: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.

ZAMAZENTA.name: Zamazenta
ZAMAZENTA.pokedex: This Pokémon slept for aeons while in the form of a statue. It was asleep for so long, people forgot that it ever existed.

ETERNATUS.name: Eternatus
ETERNATUS.pokedex: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.

KUBFU.name: Kubfu
KUBFU.pokedex: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.

URSHIFU.name: Urshifu
URSHIFU.pokedex: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

ZARUDE.name: Zarude
ZARUDE.pokedex: Once the vines on Zarude's body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow.

REGIELEKI.name: Regieleki
REGIELEKI.pokedex: This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It's said that removing the rings on Regieleki's body will unleash the Pokémon's latent power.

REGIDRAGO.name: Regidrago
REGIDRAGO.pokedex: Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of every dragon Pokémon.

GLASTRIER.name: Glastrier
GLASTRIER.pokedex: Glastrier has tremendous physical strength, and the mask of ice covering its face is 100 times harder than diamond.

SPECTRIER.name: Spectrier
SPECTRIER.pokedex: As it dashes through the night, Spectrier absorbs the life-force of sleeping creatures. It craves silence and solitude.

CALYREX.name: Calyrex
CALYREX.pokedex: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.

WYRDEER.name: Wyrdeer
WYRDEER.pokedex: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing

KLEAVOR.name: Kleavor
KLEAVOR.pokedex: This Pokémon is a rough, crude, and violent sort. It swings around its large, heavy stone axes to finish off its prey.

URSALUNA.name: Ursaluna
URSALUNA.pokedex: The swampy terrain that Ursaluna lives in gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.

BASCULEGION.name: Basculegion
BASCULEGION.pokedex: This Pokémon is cloaked in the souls of its comrades who perished during a punishing journey to the river of their birth.

SNEASLER.name: Sneasler
SNEASLER.pokedex: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.

OVERQWIL.name: Overqwil
OVERQWIL.pokedex: Overqwil's poisonous spikes will reflexively react even while Overqwil sleeps, stabbing any moving thing that approaches.

ENAMORUS.name: Enamorus
ENAMORUS.pokedex: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

SPRIGATITO.name: Sprigatito
SPRIGATITO.pokedex: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.

FLORAGATO.name: Floragato
FLORAGATO.pokedex: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.

MEOWSCARADA.name: Meowscarada
MEOWSCARADA.pokedex: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining in its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

FUECOCO.name: Fuecoco
FUECOCO.pokedex: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy.

CROCALOR.name: Crocalor
CROCALOR.pokedex: The combination of Crocalor's fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon's head.

SKELEDIRGE.name: Skeledirge
SKELEDIRGE.pokedex: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge's head gained a soul.

QUAXLY.name: Quaxly
QUAXLY.pokedex: Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking things.

QUAXWELL.name: Quaxwell
QUAXWELL.pokedex: These Pokémon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully.

QUAQUAVAL.name: Quaquaval
QUAQUAVAL.pokedex: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands.

LECHONK.name: Lechonk
LECHONK.pokedex: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn't use it for anything other than foraging.

OINKOLOGNE.name: Oinkologne
OINKOLOGNE.pokedex: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

TAROUNTULA.name: Tarountula
TAROUNTULA.pokedex: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon's natural enemy.

SPIDOPS.name: Spidops
SPIDOPS.pokedex: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.

NYMBLE.name: Nymble
NYMBLE.pokedex: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it's in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.

LOKIX.name: Lokix
LOKIX.pokedex: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.

PAWMI.name: Pawmi
PAWMI.pokedex: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.

PAWMO.name: Pawmo
PAWMO.pokedex: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.

PAWMOT.name: Pawmot
PAWMOT.pokedex: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.

TANDEMAUS.name: Tandemaus
TANDEMAUS.pokedex: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.

MAUSHOLD.name: Maushold
MAUSHOLD.pokedex: They build huge nests with many rooms that are used for different purposes, such as eating and sleeping.

FIDOUGH.name: Fidough
FIDOUGH.pokedex: This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough's breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon's vicinity.

DACHSBUN.name: Dachsbun
DACHSBUN.pokedex: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon's body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.

SMOLIV.name: Smoliv
SMOLIV.pokedex: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

DOLLIV.name: Dolliv
DOLLIV.pokedex: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

ARBOLIVA.name: Arboliva
ARBOLIVA.pokedex: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

SQUAWKABILLY.name: Squawkabilly
SQUAWKABILLY.pokedex: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.

NACLI.name: Nacli
NACLI.pokedex: The ground scrapes its body as it travels, causing it to leave salt behind. Salt is constantly being created and replenished inside Nacli's body.

NACLSTACK.name: Naclstack
NACLSTACK.pokedex: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey's body.

GARGANACL.name: Garganacl
GARGANACL.pokedex: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.

CHARCADET.name: Charcadet
CHARCADET.pokedex: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

ARMAROUGE.name: Armarouge
ARMAROUGE.pokedex: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.

CERULEDGE.name: Ceruledge
CERULEDGE.pokedex: An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon's evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.

TADBULB.name: Tadbulb
