TADBULB.pokedex: It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.

BELLIBOLT.name: Bellibolt
BELLIBOLT.pokedex: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.

WATTREL.name: Wattrel
WATTREL.pokedex: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.

KILOWATTREL.name: Kilowattrel
KILOWATTREL.pokedex: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.

MASCHIFF.name: Maschiff
MASCHIFF.pokedex: Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.

MABOSSTIFF.name: Mabosstiff
MABOSSTIFF.pokedex: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.

SHROODLE.name: Shroodle
SHROODLE.pokedex: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.

GRAFAIAI.name: Grafaiai
GRAFAIAI.pokedex: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.

BRAMBLIN.name: Bramblin
BRAMBLIN.pokedex: A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon.

BRAMBLEGHAST.name: Brambleghast
BRAMBLEGHAST.pokedex: It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it.

TOEDSCOOL.name: Toedscool
TOEDSCOOL.pokedex: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

TOEDSCRUEL.name: Toedscruel
TOEDSCRUEL.pokedex: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.

KLAWF.name: Klawf
KLAWF.pokedex: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can't remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.

CAPSAKID.name: Capsakid
CAPSAKID.pokedex: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.

SCOVILLAIN.name: Scovillain
SCOVILLAIN.pokedex: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.

RELLOR.name: Rellor
RELLOR.pokedex: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.

RABSCA.name: Rabsca
RABSCA.pokedex: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.

FLITTLE.name: Flittle
FLITTLE.pokedex: Flittle's toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon's belly.

ESPATHRA.name: Espathra
ESPATHRA.pokedex: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.

TINKATINK.name: Tinkatink
TINKATINK.pokedex: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

TINKATUFF.name: Tinkatuff
TINKATUFF.pokedex: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.

TINKATON.name: Tinkaton
TINKATON.pokedex: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.

WIGLETT.name: Wiglett
WIGLETT.pokedex: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

WUGTRIO.name: Wugtrio
WUGTRIO.pokedex: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.

BOMBIRDIER.name: Bombirdier
BOMBIRDIER.pokedex: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon's chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.

FINIZEN.name: Finizen
FINIZEN.pokedex: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.

PALAFIN.name: Palafin
PALAFIN.pokedex: This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation.

VAROOM.name: Varoom
VAROOM.pokedex: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

REVAVROOM.name: Revavroom
REVAVROOM.pokedex: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders— now numbering eight—to generate energy.

CYCLIZAR.name: Cyclizar
CYCLIZAR.pokedex: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

ORTHWORM.name: Orthworm
ORTHWORM.pokedex: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.

GLIMMET.name: Glimmet
GLIMMET.pokedex: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

GLIMMORA.name: Glimmora
GLIMMORA.pokedex: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.

GREAVARD.name: Greavard
GREAVARD.pokedex: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.

HOUNDSTONE.name: Houndstone
HOUNDSTONE.pokedex: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.

FLAMIGO.name: Flamigo
FLAMIGO.pokedex: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

CETODDLE.name: Cetoddle
CETODDLE.pokedex: This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer.

CETITAN.name: Cetitan
CETITAN.pokedex: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.

VELUZA.name: Veluza
VELUZA.pokedex: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.

DONDOZO.name: Dondozo
DONDOZO.pokedex: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it's bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

TATSUGIRI.name: Tatsugiri
TATSUGIRI.pokedex: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.

ANNIHILAPE.name: Annihilape
ANNIHILAPE.pokedex: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.

CLODSIRE.name: Clodsire
CLODSIRE.pokedex: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It's a risky move that puts everything on the line.

FARIGIRAF.name: Farigiraf
FARIGIRAF.pokedex: Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokémon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig's.

DUDUNSPARCE.name: Dudunsparce
DUDUNSPARCE.pokedex: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.

KINGAMBIT.name: Kingambit
KINGAMBIT.pokedex: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.

GREATTUSK.name: Great Tusk
GREATTUSK.pokedex: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book.

SCREAMTAIL.name: Scream Tail
SCREAMTAIL.pokedex: There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal.

BRUTEBONNET.name: Brute Bonnet
BRUTEBONNET.pokedex: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.

FLUTTERMANE.name: Flutter Mane
FLUTTERMANE.pokedex: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.

SLITHERWING.name: Slither Wing
SLITHERWING.pokedex: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.

SANDYSHOCKS.name: Sandy Shocks
SANDYSHOCKS.pokedex: No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon's traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal.

IRONTREADS.name: Iron Treads
IRONTREADS.pokedex: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.

IRONBUNDLE.name: Iron Bundle
IRONBUNDLE.pokedex: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.

IRONHANDS.name: Iron Hands
IRONHANDS.pokedex: It is very similar to a cyborg covered exclusively by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete.

IRONJUGULIS.name: Iron Jugulis
IRONJUGULIS.pokedex: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.

IRONMOTH.name: Iron Moth
IRONMOTH.pokedex: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.

IRONTHORNS.name: Iron Thorns
IRONTHORNS.pokedex: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.

FRIGIBAX.name: Frigibax
FRIGIBAX.pokedex: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.

ARCTIBAX.name: Arctibax
ARCTIBAX.pokedex: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.

BAXCALIBUR.name: Baxcalibur
BAXCALIBUR.pokedex: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.

GIMMIGHOUL.name: Gimmighoul
GIMMIGHOUL.pokedex: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.

GHOLDENGO.name: Gholdengo
GHOLDENGO.pokedex: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

WOCHIEN.name: Wo-Chien
WOCHIEN.pokedex: The grudge of a person punished for writing the king's evil deeds upon wooden tablets has clad itself in dead leaves to become a Pokémon.

CHIENPAO.name: Chien-Pao
CHIENPAO.pokedex: This Pokémon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused.

TINGLU.name: Ting-Lu
TINGLU.pokedex: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.

CHIYU.name: Chi-Yu
CHIYU.pokedex: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.

ROARINGMOON.name: Roaring Moon
ROARINGMOON.pokedex: It is possible that this is the creature listed as Roaring Moon in an expedition journal that still holds many mysteries.

IRONVALIANT.name: Iron Valiant
IRONVALIANT.pokedex: It has some similarities to a mad scientist's invention covered in a paranormal magazine.

KORAIDON.name: Koraidon
KORAIDON.pokedex: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.

MIRAIDON.name: Miraidon
MIRAIDON.pokedex: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.

WALKINGWAKE.name: Walking Wake
WALKINGWAKE.pokedex: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.

IRONLEAVES.name: Iron Leaves
IRONLEAVES.pokedex: According to the few eyewitness accounts that exist, it used its shining blades to julienne large trees and boulders.

DIPPLIN.name: Dipplin
DIPPLIN.pokedex: The head sticking out belongs to the fore-wyrm, while the tail belongs to the core-wyrm. The two share one apple and help each other out.

POLTCHAGEIST.name: Poltchageist
POLTCHAGEIST.pokedex: Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokémon.

SINISTCHA.name: Sinistcha
SINISTCHA.pokedex: It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful.

OKIDOGI.name: Okidogi
OKIDOGI.pokedex: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.

MUNKIDORI.name: Munkidori
MUNKIDORI.pokedex: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom.

FEZANDIPITI.name: Fezandipiti
FEZANDIPITI.pokedex: Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body.

OGERPON.name: Ogerpon
OGERPON.pokedex: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.

ARCHALUDON.name: Archaludon
ARCHALUDON.pokedex: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.

HYDRAPPLE.name: Hydrapple
HYDRAPPLE.pokedex: These capricious syrpents have banded together. On the rare occasion that their moods align, their true power is unleashed.

GOUGINGFIRE.name: Gouging Fire
GOUGINGFIRE.pokedex: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.

RAGINGBOLT.name: Raging Bolt
RAGINGBOLT.pokedex: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.

IRONBOULDER.name: Iron Boulder
IRONBOULDER.pokedex: It was named after a mysterious object recorded in an old book. Its body seems to be metallic.

IRONCROWN.name: Iron Crown
IRONCROWN.pokedex: There was supposedly an incident in which it launched shining blades to cut everything around it to pieces. Little else is known about it.

TERAPAGOS.name: Terapagos
TERAPAGOS.pokedex: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.

PECHARUNT.name: Pecharunt
PECHARUNT.pokedex: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt's control, chained to its will.
